title: Governo angolano aprova instrumentos jurídicos sobre Cibersegurança
description: INACOM (Angolan national communications regulator) notice on the Government's approval of cybersecurity legal instruments, including the National Cybersecurity Strategy (Presidential Decree 2256/25). No mention of post-quantum / quantum-safe cryptography; cryptography addressed only conventionally.

title: Proposta de Lei da Cibersegurança apreciada pelo Conselho de Ministros
description: INACOM notice on the Cybersecurity bill reviewed by the Council of Ministers. General cybersecurity legislation; no post-quantum / PQC reference.

title: Decreto Presidencial n.º 256/25 – Estratégia Nacional de Cibersegurança
description: Text of Angola's National Cybersecurity Strategy (Presidential Decree, published Diário da República 3 Dec 2025, period 2024-2028) on the Angolex legal portal. Confirmed via WebFetch to reference only conventional encryption ('uso da criptografia para proteger dados em trânsito e em repouso'); no quantum/post-quantum content. Hosted on a private legal-database site, not an official .gov.ao domain.

title: MINTTICS - Angola trabalha na legislação sobre cibersegurança
description: Ministry of Telecommunications, IT and Social Media (MINTTICS) news item on Angola's cybersecurity legislation work. No post-quantum / quantum-safe cryptography reference.

title: MINTTICS - Cibersegurança em Angola: certificação e incentivo às boas práticas
description: MINTTICS news item on the SEGA enterprise-security platform and cybersecurity best-practice certification. No post-quantum / PQC content.

title: MINTTICS - Governo aposta na criação de uma agência cibernética
description: MINTTICS news item on the planned national cybersecurity agency. No post-quantum / quantum-safe cryptography reference.

title: Novo modelo para a governação da cibersegurança em Angola
description: Portal de TI (Angolan technology news outlet) article on Angola's new cybersecurity governance model. Journalism, not institutional; no PQC reference.

title: Angola aprova Estratégia Nacional de Cibersegurança com reforço da regulamentação do sector digital
description: Menos Fios (technology news outlet) report on adoption of the National Cybersecurity Strategy. Journalism, not institutional; no post-quantum content.

title: Angola - Octopus Cybercrime Community
description: Council of Europe (international body) country wiki summarising Angola's cybercrime/cybersecurity legal framework. Not a domestic Angolan issuer; no PQC reference.

title: NCSI :: Angola - National Cyber Security Index
description: e-Governance Academy (Estonia) index entry rating Angola's cybersecurity capacity. Foreign/NGO index, not a domestic issuer; no PQC content.
